title: TapTable
description: Play Foundry VTT from your phone or tablet. TapTable wraps your world in a phone-shaped interface: bottom navigation (Home, Board, Sheet, Roller, Chat, Combat, Macros, Mods, Settings), touch drag-and-drop, canvas gestures, touch-friendly combat (token controls, targeting, multi-select, combatant carousel), a quick-roll dice builder with a "Roll as..." actor picker, and graceful reconnect handling. Activates automatically on phones only, so desktop players see zero change. Deep D&D 5e integration out of the box (touch character sheet, HP/vitals, favorites, one-tap checks/saves/skills, initiative, compendium browsing, template placement); the essentials work on any game system, and developers can add deep support for more systems via the adapter API (see ADAPTERS.md). Ships in English, French, German, Spanish, Brazilian Portuguese, and Italian. Not affiliated with or endorsed by Foundry Gaming LLC.
